brief: Write a limerick about a lazy cat. Form: limerick (AABBA).
poem:
There once was a cat from Maine
Who refused to go out in the rain.
He slept on the mat
Next to the fat rat
And never got up again.
user_request: Write a limerick about a lazy cat

brief: Write a quatrain (ABAB) about rain on a tin roof.
poem:
The rain on the tin
makes a sound like a din.
When the storm lets up
we fill the old cup.
